query: SELECT id, status, progressStep, progressPercent, title, updatedAt FROM videos WHERE status IN ('generating_script', 'generating_voiceover', 'generating_video') ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 357oVLGrrfEVroP.92f7c3f84fd5 --database B9GyrhcpQX4Q32cZzpFMG9 --execute SELECT id, status, progressStep, progressPercent, title, updatedAt FROM videos WHERE status IN ('generating_script', 'generating_voiceover', 'generating_video') ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 5;
